title: Three months from elections, Latvian parties jostle for position
summary_full: With exactly three months until Latvia holds parliamentary elections, political parties are jostling for position, according to the latest voter polling carried out for SKDS on behalf of Latvian Television.
summary_public: With exactly three months until Latvia holds parliamentary elections, political parties are jostling for position, according to the latest voter polling carried out for SKDS on behalf of Latvian Television.
